name: Clickolding
description:
You know why you're here, click it.

Based on the game Clickolding where you play the part of a silent protagonist simply clicking a clicker.

Idk, this has been in my drafts for a bit and wanted to finish it. Rem bot tomorrow for any maid enjoyers. I also have a bot planned for music mania (Kinda already done making it, just have to wait for the event).
